ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Unique ticker symbol of the company */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "sec_filings" TEXT /* Type of SEC filings (e.g., reports, forms) */,
  "gics_sector" TEXT /* GICS sector classification of the company */,
  "gics_sub_industry" TEXT /* GICS sub-industry classification of the company */,
  "headquarters_address" TEXT /* Address of the company's headquarters */,
  "date_first_added" TEXT /* Date the company was first added to a major stock index */,
  "cik" INTEGER /* Central Index Key (CIK) assigned by the SEC */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the company's business */,
  "industry_classification" TEXT /* Industry classification of the company */,
  "sector_classification" TEXT /* Sector classification of the company */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "market_capitalization" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" TEXT /* Net income of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker_symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_gics_sector FOREIGN KEY ("gics_sector") REFERENCES gics_sectors ("gics_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_gics_sub_industry FOREIGN KEY ("gics_sub_industry") REFERENCES gics_sub_industries ("gics_sub_industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gics_sectors" (
  "gics_sector_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each GICS sector */,
  "gics_sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the GICS sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the GICS sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" TEXT /* Parent sector ID, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gics_sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gics_sub_industries" (
  "gics_sub_industry_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each GICS sub-industry */,
  "gics_sub_industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the GICS sub-industry */,
  "gics_sector_id" TEXT /* Reference to the GICS sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the GICS sub-industry */,
  "parent_sub_industry_id" TEXT /* Parent sub-industry ID, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gics_sub_industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock index */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_index_membership" (
  "company_ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock index */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the company was added to the index */,
  "date_removed" TEXT /* Date the company was removed from the index */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_ticker_symbol", "index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corporate_filings" (
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing */,
  "company_ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the filing was made */,
  "filing_type" TEXT /* Type of filing (e.g., 10-K, 10-Q) */,
  "filing_description" TEXT /* Description of the filing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "company_ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was issued */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year the report pertains to */,
  "fiscal_quarter" INTEGER /* Fiscal quarter the report pertains to */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue reported in the fiscal period */,
  "net_income" TEXT /* Net income reported in the fiscal period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, search) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who collaborated */,
  "company_ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company collaborated on */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., annotation, comment) */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id")
)
